description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat roof and a spacious open-plan layout. The structure is surrounded by a low boundary wall and includes landscaped green areas with trees at both ends. The front section has a driveway and a covered carport, while the rear features a private garden space. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed along the sides, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored plaster and wood accents, with paved walkways and patio areas. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, open-plan layout, landscaped gardens, and large windows, featuring a driveway and carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, and main entrance with landscaped greenery and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, low boundary wall, and the linear arrangement of rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private garden, patio area, and additional greenery with visible back entrances.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, boundary wall, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and rear windows
